---
name: Bug Report / Formula Correction
description: Report an error in a Trinity formula or derivation
---

## Which formula?
- [ ] Q01-Q07 (quark masses)
- [ ] L01-L03 (lepton masses)
- [ ] G01-G06 (gauge couplings)
- [ ] H01-H03 (Higgs sector)
- [ ] N01-N04 (PMNS mixing)
- [ ] C01-C03 (CKM matrix)
- [ ] Other

## Expected value (from PDG)
Please cite PDG year and exact value.

## Actual Trinity formula and value
Formula + computed value + error percentage.

## Proposed correction
If you have a better H4-derived formula, please provide it with derivation.

## References
Links to papers, PDG entries, or experimental results.
